description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a skeletonized stock. The rifle features a prominent Picatinny rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories, and a short barrel with a squared-off muzzle. The grip is ergonomic and integrated with the trigger guard, while the magazine is a detachable box type, inserted vertically in front of the trigger. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip and includes additional rail segments for tactical attachments. The overall design is streamlined and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a skeletonized stock, Picatinny rails, and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, skeletonized stock, Picatinny rail, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, muzzle, and slim profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0 with clear visibility of the stock and handguard.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the magazine and grip.
